title: EventSource push notifications
description: Implement RFC 8620 §7.3 EventSource endpoint in nie-daemon. Emit state-change events (Message, Chat, Contact state tokens) when relay delivers new content. Emit presence events when relay fires user_joined/user_left. Emit typing events (once typing indicator protocol support exists). Clients call /changes on receipt of state events.
close_reason: RFC 8620 §7.3 SSE endpoint at /jmap/eventsource/ with auth, types filter, closeafter, ping keep-alive. Maps DaemonEvent::MessageReceived→Message state, UserJoined/Left/DirectoryUpdated→ChatContact state. URL template with {types}/{closeafter}/{ping} placeholders.
